title: triodia irritans
intro: Triodia irritans, also known as Bladder Grass, is a type of native Australian plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Triodia irritans include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Triodia irritans can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
